name: ida-hub
description: IDA Chat Hub — unified gateway for IDA Pro instances and external agents

scripts.bundle: bun build src/server.ts --target=bun --outdir=dist --minify && rm -rf web dist/web && cp -r ../web/dist web
scripts.bundle:bin: cp -r ../web/dist dist/web && bun scripts/embed-web.ts && bun build src/server.ts --compile --outfile dist/ida-hub
